coverage: 100% of the reachable node types across the 46-group, 828-node closure.
validation: The browser reproduces the relative three-object structure, welded quad-sphere seed, repeated tight-wrap/dual-mesh deformation, and finalized shell. Structure-preview topology is exact at 8,040 / 9,300. The finalized shell retains the intended wrapped mass and cavities but is lower density than Blender at 1,352 / 2,700 versus 3,302 / 4,675. Missing Budokan and Avenir fonts belong to auxiliary label graphs and are not required by the putty surface.
